text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I happen to pass by the outdoor stage<n>after
training, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Thanks for droppin' by today, Grass<n>and Spe!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to thank us. So,<n>what's the
occasion?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You said you had something to show<n>us?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Why, I'm glad you asked!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I could give you the answer, but a<n>true
entertainer communicates on the<n>stage! Now,
feast your eyes on this<n>special performance!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh... El?! Where did she—

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: CAAAAAWWWWW!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why is a bird here?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, wouldn't you know? It's El's<n>pet hawk,
Mambo.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A h-hawk?! I heard that El had a pet<n>condor...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass! Spe! You shouldn't let your<n>guards down!
For now, I am over<n>HEEEEERE!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The show's started?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Uno! For your appetizer, we're<n>tossing up our
favorite judo throws!<n>So fresh and fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caw! ♪ Caaaaawww! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gosh, this does seem awfully fun.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Dos! Grilled fish is off the menu<n>today! Instead,
enjoy a piledriver<n>that's so well done it's
sizzlin'!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caw! CAAAAAWWW!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: M-Mambo's getting fired up?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Tres! For the main dish, it's a<n>show-stopping
tornillo! Mash 'em,<n>grate 'em, and stick 'em in a
stew!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caw! Ca-caw! ♪ Caaaaawww! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, this is very exciting.<n>It's just like
a circus! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Maravilloso! Now that our full-course<n>menu is
complete, it's time for<n>everyone to join in!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All together now! Who's the world's<n>greatest
Phantom Bird?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Is this perhaps a call-and-response<n>
performance? In that case...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! Put some bass in your<n>voices—shout it
out loud! Who's the<n>world's greatest Phantom
Bird?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder and Special Week
text_block_list.text: E-El Condor... Pasa?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, no! Your voices gotta match my<n>passion!
Who's the world's greatest<n>Phantom Bird?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder and Special Week
text_block_list.text: EL CONDOR PASAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! I am numero uno! The greatest<n>luchadora
around—El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder and Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That performance got me heated up!<n>I'm all
sweaty now!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it was a wonderful performance.<n>You truly
connected with your<n>audience.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gracias, both of you! I've finally<n>found a
performance that's unique to<n>me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm bringing in the lucha spirit, just<n>how my papi
taught me! Right,<n>Mambo?

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: CAAAAAWWWWW! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? What are you all doing at thishour—is that a bird?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gah! It'll be curtains for me if she<n>finds out that
Mambo's my pet!<n>Everyone, run!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! I can't just spring into<n>action just
like that!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, El had my undivided<n>attention. But it
would be wise to make<n>our escape now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaaargh?! Wait, El! Graaaaass!
